code.parse_mode_reason: Requested 2D physics subset pass; 3D lifting is forbidden for this run.

readme_task_contract.summary: Instructional Plinko video for the inverse task: follow the dropped marble from its known hole to its landing position.

attached_instructions.text: In this experiment, we will ask you to make judgments about physical interactions. These interactions take place in a plinko box, a box with three holes on the top and obstacles inside. We drop a marble into one of the holes and it falls to the bottom of the plinko box bouncing off any obstacles in the way. Here are some examples to familiarize you with how the plinko box works:

config_metadata.description: Participants infer which of three holes a ball was dropped from based on visual scenes and, in some conditions, accompanying audio of the drop.
